nasb.text: But as for those whose hearts go after their detestable things and abominations, I will bring their conduct down on their heads,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: But as for those whose heart goes after their detestable things and their abominations, I will bring their deeds upon their own heads, declares the Lord God.”

cnv.text: 至於那些心中隨從可厭的偶像和可憎之物的人，我要把他們所行的，報應在他們的頭上。”這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 至于那些心里恋慕丑恶可憎之物的人，我必按他们所行的报应他们。这是主耶和华说的。”
